title: Velvet Gelatin Wrap
description: A nutty and velvety vegan-friendly Algerian dish featuring gelatine leafs prepared with sous-vide technique for a cozy texture.
instructions: Mix coconut milk, coconut cream, chia seeds, agave syrup, and matcha powder in a blender until smooth.
Pour the mixture into a sous-vide bag and seal it. Cook at 65°C (149°F) for 30 minutes.
Sieve the cooled mixture to remove any lumps or clumps, then stir in almond flour until well combined.
Transfer the gelatin mixture to a mold and refrigerate for 2 hours until set.
Remove from the mold and cut into desired shapes. Garnish with coconut flakes before serving.
